title: 嗜血印 Bloody Spell

notes: Tried disabling D3D11 and using D9vk without success. Black screen, nothing happens. Proton log says it's having an issue with some media, probably some unsupported video format for game's intro.
title: 嗜血印 Bloody Spell

notes:
Initially I was getting the same black screen issue mentioned by other users, so I set proton to output to debug logs and went through them, the only issue I could see was that h264 playback was causing some errors.

I installed ffdshow video codecs using winetricks to the games wineprefix and this largely solved the issue (causes a weird bug for me where the game minimises itself, but once given focus again works fine)

The game ran very well once in game, except for one issue where the mouse loses focus when in game menus, you can alt tab out of the game and back to get control back but that causes the camera to spin out of control which requires another alt tab and back to resolve. for now I highly recommend controller play if you run into the same issue, tested with a wired Xbox 360 controller and had no issues at all so far(heres hoping).
title: 嗜血印 Bloody Spell

notes: Use "protontricks 992300 ffdshow" to get past black screen. Once you're in game, it plays fine, though there is some annoying audio distortion/crackling.
title: 嗜血印 Bloody Spell

notes: As mentioned, using "protontricks 992300 ffdshow" seems to work (for protontricks installation instructions, visit https://github.com/Matoking/protontricks). For some reason, game started in chinese, you can change language going to the second to last option in main menu, then first option, then change first item to English. Played through tutorial without issues.
title: 嗜血印 Bloody Spell
